description_long: This is a rectangular, vertical filing cabinet with a light brown outer shell and three large, black front-facing drawers. Each drawer features a triangular metallic or white recessed pull handle at the top center, providing a modern and functional appearance. The sides and back of the cabinet are plain and unadorned, emphasizing the utilitarian design. The cabinet is likely constructed from wood or metal with a painted or laminated finish, and the drawers are deep enough to accommodate files or documents. The overall build suggests durability and suitability for frequent use in an organized environment. Its compact footprint makes it ideal for placement against a wall or in a corner, maximizing storage in limited spaces.
description: A tall, brown filing cabinet with three black drawers, each featuring a triangular recessed handle. The design is modern and functional, with a sturdy, plain exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing three black drawers with triangular recessed handles on a brown cabinet.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain brown side panel and the depth of the drawers.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless brown back panel with no visible hardware.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, highlighting the plain brown side and drawer depth.
